SlateID.description: The SlateID that this SlateGame refers to

Operator.description: The name of the operator who is running contests for this slate Possible values: FanDuel; DraftKings; Yahoo; FantasyDraft; etc.

OperatorSlateID.description: Unique ID of a slate (assigned by the operator).

OperatorName.description: The name of the slate (assigned by the operator). Possible values: Main, Express, Arcade, Late Night, etc.

OperatorDay.description: The day (in EST/EDT) that the slate begins (assigned by the operator)

OperatorStartTime.description: The date/time (in EST/EDT) that the slate begins (assigned by the operator).

NumberOfGames.description: The number of actual games that this slate covers

IsMultiDaySlate.description: Whether or not this slate uses games that take place on different days (true/false)

RemovedByOperator.description: Indicates whether this slate was removed/deleted by the operator.

OperatorGameType.description: The game type of the slate. Note: Will often be null as most operators only have one game type

DfsSlateGames.description: The games that are included in this slate

DfsSlatePlayers.description: The players that are included in this slate

SlateRosterSlots.description: The positions that need to be filled for this particular slate

SalaryCap.description: The salary cap for the current slate (is null for slates with no salary cap such a Tiers gametypes)
